title: Feruchemist Origins
description: Adds Origins based on Brandon Sandersons Feruchemists
body:
This is 15 of the 16 Feruchemical powers from Brandon Sanderson's Mistborn series, Made into Origins. This is my "Minecraft" interpretation of all the powers except for aluminum because it did not translate really at all.
REQUIRES- Origins, and Pehkui
They are as follows:


<dl>
<dt>Archivist</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Memories(XP). </dt>
<dt>Store Memories</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your xp. as long as you have 1 level of xp you will loose a level and your bar will tick up.(Max: 200 levels)</dt>
<dt>Tap Memories</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your xp. gain 1 level per second.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Bloodmaker</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Health.</dt>
<dt>Store Health</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Health. you will be unable to regen and your bar will tick up.</dt>
<dt>Tap Health</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Health. you will be able to heal from grave injury.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Brute</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap strength.</dt>
<dt>Store Strength</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your strength. your damage and defense will be halfed and your strength bar will tick up.</dt>
<dt>Tap Strength</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your strength. you will become 3 times as strong but your bar will tick done fast.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Firesoul</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Warmth.</dt>
<dt>Store Warmth</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Warmth. you will gain frostwalker and be immune to fire damage(not lava) and your bar will tick up.</dt>
<dt>Tap Warmth</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Warmth. you will become immune to freeze damage, and light targets on fire with you punches.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Gasper</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Breath.</dt>
<dt>Store Breath</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Breath. you will begin to drown everywere and your bar will tick up.</dt>
<dt>Tap Breath</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Breath. you will become immune to suffocation damage, and gain water breathing.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Sentry</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Wakefulness.</dt>
<dt>Store Wakefulness</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Wakefulness. you will gain slowness and phantoms will come much more as your bar ticks up.</dt>
<dt>Tap Wakefulness</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Wakefulness. you will gain a small amount of night vision and have no phantoms.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Skimmer</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap weight.</dt>
<dt>Store Weight</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your weight. you become much lighter and your weight bar will tick up.</dt>
<dt>Tap Weight</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your weight. you will become much heavier but your bar will tick down.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Soulbearer</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Investure(potion effects).</dt>
<dt>Store Investure</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Investure. you will loose the effects that you have but will gain storage in your bar.</dt>
<dt>Tap Investure</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Investure. you will gain an aditional level of every effect you gain.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Sparker</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Mental Speed(xp gain).</dt>
<dt>Store Mental Speed</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Mental Speed. you will gain xp half as fast and your bar will tick up.</dt>
<dt>Tap Mental Speed</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Mental Speed. you will gain xp 3 times as fast for 1/6th the time you spent storing.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Spinner</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Fortune.</dt>
<dt>Store Fortune</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Fortune. you will have a 5% chance for every block you mine to make a small explosion, and a 5% chance to take extra damage.</dt>
<dt>Tap Fortune</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Fortune. you will gain fortune to any block you mine aswell as luck.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Steelrunner</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap speed.</dt>
<dt>Store Speed</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your speed. you will become half as fast and your spead bar will tick up.</dt>
<dt>Tap Speed</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your speed. you will become 4 times as fast but your bar will tick done fast.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Subsumer</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Energy.</dt>
<dt>Store Energy</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Energy. you will have greatly increased hunger and your bar will tick up.</dt>
<dt>Tap energy</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Energy. your food will fill up but you will not gain health from it.</dt>
</dl>

<dl>
<dt>Connector</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Connection.</dt>
<dt>Store Connection</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Connection. Villagers will barly trade with you and their prices will be very high.</dt>
<dt>Tap Connection</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Connection. ALL entities will become passive toward you.</dt>
</dl>

<dt><dl>
Pinnacle</dt>
<dt>Feruchemist with the ability to store and tap Determination.</dt>
<dt>Store Determination</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶鬼econdary] you will start to store your Determination. You will be slower, weaker, and your vision will be dimmer.</dt>
<dt>Tap Determination</dt>
<dt>By pressing [窶輝rimary] you will start to tap your Determination. You gain speed, strength, the ability to sense nearby enemies, and your vision is brightened.</dt>
</dl>
